'''âng-m-m''' ('''shangamam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mylonitize|mylonitize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mylonitize|mylonitize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-m-m
|-
! Lemma
| shangamam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingamam|thingamam]] || [[word:jingamam|jingamam]] || [[word:shingamam|shingamam]] || [[word:kingamam|kingamam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungamam|thuthungamam]] || [[word:jujungamam|jujungamam]] || [[word:shushungamam|shushungamam]] || [[word:kukungamam|kukungamam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungamam|thungamam]] || [[word:jungamam|jungamam]] || [[word:shungamam|shungamam]] || [[word:kungamam|kungamam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungamam|thungamam]] || [[word:jungamam|jungamam]] || [[word:shungamam|shungamam]] || [[word:kungamam|kungamam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengamam|thengamam]] || [[word:jengamam|jengamam]] || [[word:shengamam|shengamam]] || [[word:kengamam|kengamam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongamam|thothongamam]] || [[word:jojongamam|jojongamam]] || [[word:shoshongamam|shoshongamam]] || [[word:kokongamam|kokongamam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongamam|thongamam]] || [[word:jongamam|jongamam]] || [[word:shongamam|shongamam]] || [[word:kongamam|kongamam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongamam|thongamam]] || [[word:jongamam|jongamam]] || [[word:shongamam|shongamam]] || [[word:kongamam|kongamam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngamam|thĂŠngamam]] || [[word:jĂŠngamam|jĂŠngamam]] || [[word:shĂŠngamam|shĂŠngamam]] || [[word:kĂŠngamam|kĂŠngamam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangamam|thathangamam]] || [[word:jajangamam|jajangamam]] || [[word:shashangamam|shashangamam]] || [[word:kakangamam|kakangamam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangamam|thangamam]] || [[word:jangamam|jangamam]] || [[word:shangamam|shangamam]] || [[word:kangamam|kangamam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangamam|thangamam]] || [[word:jangamam|jangamam]] || [[word:shangamam|shangamam]] || [[word:kangamam|kangamam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangamam|shangamam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangamam|goshangamam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangamam|gokishangamam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangamamnĂŒ|shangamamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangamamnknĂŒ|goshangamamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamamnĂŒ|gokishangamamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangamamshĂ«|shangamamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangamamnkshĂ«|goshangamamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangamamshĂ«|gokishangamamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamamro|shangamamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamamnkro|goshangamamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamamro|gokishangamamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamamu|shangamamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamamnkmu|goshangamamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamamu|gokishangamamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangamamsher|shangamamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangamamnksher|goshangamamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangamamsher|gokishangamamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangamamng|shangamamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangamamnkng|goshangamamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangamamng|gokishangamamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangamamya|shangamamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangamamnkya|goshangamamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangamamya|gokishangamamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangamamyam|shangamamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangamamnkyam|goshangamamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangamamyam|gokishangamamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangamamnĂŒshĂ«|shangamamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangamamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangamamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangamamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangamamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamamnĂŒro|shangamamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamamnknĂŒro|goshangamamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamamnĂŒro|gokishangamamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamamnĂŒmu|shangamamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamamnknĂŒmu|goshangamamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamamnĂŒmu|gokishangamamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangamamshĂ«nĂŒ|shangamamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangamamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangamamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangamamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamamshĂ«ro|shangamamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamamnkshĂ«ro|goshangamamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamamshĂ«ro|gokishangamamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamamshĂ«mu|shangamamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamamnkshĂ«mu|goshangamamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamamshĂ«mu|gokishangamamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangamamronĂŒ|shangamamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangamamnkronĂŒ|goshangamamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamamronĂŒ|gokishangamamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangamamroshĂ«|shangamamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangamamnkroshĂ«|goshangamamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangamamroshĂ«|gokishangamamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangamamromu|shangamamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangamamnkromu|goshangamamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangamamromu|gokishangamamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangamamunĂŒ|shangamamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangamamnkmunĂŒ|goshangamamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangamamunĂŒ|gokishangamamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangamamushĂ«|shangamamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangamamnkmushĂ«|goshangamamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangamamushĂ«|gokishangamamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangamamuro|shangamamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangamamnkmuro|goshangamamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangamamuro|gokishangamamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
